[157:16]so that the far right could never pose a real threat

[157:22]could never give anybody a viable alternative.

[157:29]different flavors of the establishment ideology.

[157:32]And someone that comes along, and by the way,

[157:35]this is the last thing I'll say,

[157:36]this is a very important part as well.

[157:39]Unlike some of these voices, I am presenting a coherent,

[157:45]distinct, self-contained, progressive, novel worldview.

[157:51]In other words, I'm not a reformed conservative

[157:56]who says, I believe everything conservatives believe,

[158:00]but I think there's something going on with Israel.

[158:02]That's not me.

[158:03]I'm not a liberal who says, I believe everything liberals believe, but I criticize the war

[158:09]in Gaza.

[158:11]I am presenting a genuinely novel, self-contained, distinct worldview that says race matters.

[158:21]Jesus Christ is God and the Catholic Church is the true church.

[158:25]We need our American sovereignty back. We need to reject all foreign influence.

[158:29]We should be cognizant of demographic change. We should be traditional with families and how we live.

[158:37]It is an authentic, reactionary, right-wing,

[158:41]Christian, American nationalist worldview.

[158:44]And that is what can never be permitted to gain traction.

[158:48]You can get left-wing.

[158:51]You get the left-wing that says Medicare for all

[158:53]and let's open the door to refugees

[158:58]and let's give welfare to the poor people

[159:01]and we need to support Ukraine.

[159:03]And you could get the right-wing

[159:06]The right wing supports most of that, but they just quibble about some of the details.

[159:11]Well, we want the taxes to be a little lower and we want the good immigrants, but not the

[159:15]bad immigrants. And we want to support Ukraine, but not this much. We want to fight China,

[159:21]not Russia. And then there is alternative. There's what you have. There is the establishment.

[159:28]There is the organized opposition to the establishment, the controlled opposition, which is permitted

[159:34]And then there is a genuine alternative

[159:37]that says, you know what?

[159:39]Maybe we need fundamental reforms.

[159:41]Maybe instead of rejecting third way feminism,

[159:43]we need to reject all of it.

[159:44]Maybe instead of rejecting illegal immigrants at the border,

[159:47]we should reject all immigrants at the border.

[160:02]But that is the real reason why someone like myself is considered.

[160:05]It's not just that I survived the most difficult period.

[160:09]It's because I'm not a reformed conservative.

[160:11]I'm not a reformed liberal.

[160:13]I'm not a conservative that sometimes says an edgy thing, sometimes winks at the audience

[160:21]I'm not a reform liberal who's basically like a regular liberal, but says Israel's committing a genocide.

[160:27]I am a genuine alternative. I'm pushing a genuine alternative to the system.

[160:36]because they can't tolerate a true alternative. Most people accept the fundamental assumptions

[160:43]and suppositions of the system that we live in a democracy. We live in a mass democracy where

[160:56]where there's zero interest rates, all this international trade. We have people running
